title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
description: On pages 12–15, Buggy’s crew threatens Orange Town with overwhelming force, turning the town itself into a hostage.
scene: Buggy’s pirates rely on spectacle and destruction, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are forced to react under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Why'd you do that to the Mayor!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He would have gotten himself killed...

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Kill him!!! Give'im the buggy Ball!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You idiot! Don't you know when to shut up!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: LUFFY! GET OUT OF THE WAY!! YOU'RE GONNA GET HITT!!!

summary: The part shows how Buggy rules through fear, while the Straw Hats begin breaking that fear through defiance and improvisation.
